summary:
ALIEN DECEPTION AND HEAVENLY SIGNS: Brandon recounts a vision from July 2014 where Jesus warned him about a coming alien deception orchestrated by demonic forces and fallen angels. He links this warning to recent astronomical observations of a massive, tailless asteroid glowing from the front, noting discussions by NASA and Avi Loeb. Brandon explains that this supposed alien invasion, featuring a giant golden mothership seen in his visions hovering over the Vatican and Mexican Mayan temples, will be used as a cover story by the Antichrist to explain the sudden disappearance of Christians during the Rapture.

CHURCH PURIFICATION AND SCANDALS: Brandon describes a divine cleansing currently unfolding within the global Christian church, emphasizing that judgment begins in the house of the Lord. He predicts the imminent exposure of major ministries and prominent religious leaders involved in severe corruption, including multi-million dollar embezzlement, money laundering, and human trafficking. According to Brandon, these public scandals and the removal of compromised elders are entirely necessary to purge the church of sin and make way for a younger, purer generation of spiritual leaders carrying a kingly anointing for the coming revival.

GLOBAL CATASTROPHES AND GOVERNMENT PREPARATIONS: Brandon warns of imminent mass-casualty events, referencing a UK government mandate for mass incinerators capable of burning hundreds of bodies at once, alongside wealthy elites like Mark Zuckerberg building massive underground bunkers in Hawaii. He details prophetic visions of a catastrophic virus that could claim 350 million lives, effectively wiping out a population the size of the United States, as well as a devastating earthquake in British Columbia resulting in 30,000 casualties. Brandon interprets these secretive governmental and elite preparations as undeniable proof that secular authorities are secretly anticipating a massive global disaster.

GEOPOLITICAL ESCALATION AND PROPHETIC TIMELINES: Brandon identifies September as a pivotal month of supernatural shifting and geopolitical division, specifically highlighting September 23 and upcoming eclipses. He analyzes international developments, describing Emmanuel Macron as an Ishmael figure who is preparing the geopolitical soil for the Antichrist by pushing for a two-state solution and recognizing Palestine at the United Nations. Furthermore, Brandon shares visions of secret alliances forming an Asian front involving Vladimir Putin, Kim Jong-un, and Xi Jinping, warning that the demonic spirit Apollyon is actively manipulating these world leaders to trigger World War III.

THE GREAT HARVEST AND ANGELIC ASSISTANCE: Brandon shares a profound spiritual encounter where Jesus, bearing massive crucifixion wounds in his hands, asked for his help in gathering the final harvest of souls before the end of the age. He describes witnessing a waterfall of warring angels dispatched from the edge of heaven, with two angels assigned to every unsaved person to remove demonic blindness and allow them to freely choose salvation. Brandon stresses the extreme urgency of repentance, urging individuals to abandon their complacency, accept Jesus Christ, and recognize that humanity has reached a point of no return.
rawData: [August 30, 2025]-[Things the Lord has been showing me are in the news]-[https://youtu.be/WjzHte1MzLA]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us again today. Well, I have my sweetheart with me. I told her, I said, there's some things I wanted her to read, but I just thought, well, let's go over some of the old videos that I've spoken and told you all what the Holy Spirit was showing us as we were praying. We're starting to see it in the news, and I think it's time to go over some of those. So, if you want to know some of the words that you know, like, 'Brandon, you're calling out all this stuff,' and we're seeing several of them in the news all at once. And I told D, I said, 'It's really cool whenever you start to see the words when we're praying as a family here on this channel, and you start to see it from you all sending us stuff saying, "Hey, did you see your word came to pass here? Did you?"' And I'm like, 'Wow, I didn't realize that happened.' So, let's go over some of those. You know, for the people who just think that we're just seeing things all the time and there's no fruit behind it, I want to do this every once in a while to show that our prayers are working. What we're praying into and what God is showing us are warnings of the signs of the times of the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. We're getting so close, but I was excited about some of it. So, number one, we were told about this ship-looking thing. I don't know what it is. It's an asteroid, slash, the size of Manhattan—a massive rock that's traveling at over 100,000 miles an hour. And it doesn't have a tail. From what they can observe, this rock, this thing that's headed towards this direction doesn't have a comet tail. It has—the front of it has lights. So, it's like headlights on this rock. So, it's burning from the front up and it's not burning from the back, which is, you know, unheard of. Usually, whenever you have a comet or whatever, they burn from their tail back and it leaves gases and stuff and particles, and it's burning. But from what I understand, when you watch this little clip from Paul Begley, he talks about this rock that is burning from the front up. But here's the thing: there's no tail. And a comet has a tail. NASA says it's a comet, but an image taken by the Hubble telescope in late July shows that the object is radiating light forward. And Avi Loeb says there's something very unusual about that. It shows a glow like a headlight in the front and no tail in the back. Not behind it is the glow; the glow is in the front. 'If it were a standard comet, we'd expect some dust to be shedding off the surface of the object, and the dust would be pushing behind the object as a result of the solar radiation pressure.' The object is unprecedented because its size and the trajectory it's coming is something we've never seen before. They think it's an alien something. We know there's no such thing as aliens. First, I have to make that clear. There is no such thing as aliens, but there are fallen angels and there are demonic spirits. We know what the Bible tells us. And what I warned you all right before Jesus Christ comes, the Lord spoke to me when I went to tribulation with Him. It's one of the last things He told me. And this is in 2014. July the 6th of 2014 is when I had this visitation from the Lord, and He took me to tribulation. So aliens and drones, all this stuff was very, very seldom in the news. You'd hear about it every once in a while on some, like, conspiracy channel or something, but now it's becoming mainstream, just like Jesus told me. He said, 'Brandon, right before I come, the days, the months before this time frame, watch for alien deception.' Watch this, because they will use this to explain away the rapture in the days ahead, telling everybody—remember I warned you—that the Christians, that people were taken away because of rebellion. That's what the Antichrist will come out and say, and he'll tell everybody about all this. 'Oh yes, the Christians were taken. These people were taken because they were a rebellious people because the Mahdi is coming.' Remember I told you the Mahdi coming. So this is part of the punishment, so they're taken out of here. So they will start to bring on false—this is by the devil's design—false alien invasions, false alien stuff. And I told you, watch for this great big mothership coming. This was a massive-looking spaceship thing. It was gold. It was thin. And it had lightning bolts beaming all around it like it was all alive. It had windows all the way around, and you could see lights coming out of it. It was over the Vatican. It was over Italy in the vision. And the other one was over the temples, these Mayan-looking temple things in Mexico, but the people had signs. They had, like, 'Welcome to Earth,' and they had signs, and they were excited about this alien thing going on in the sky. So they were like tinfoil hat people. Like, I'm talking, had signs, and they were—and I started to laugh because when I saw it, I thought, 'That's really funny, Lord.' And the Lord said, 'No, this is not funny. This is a great deception, and many people are going to fall for what's about to take place on the earth.' They're trying to come up with an alibi. The demonic is coming up with an alibi of what happens when the rapture takes place. Now, they're talking about this thing looks like it's alive and it's moving in the way it's moving. We've never seen anything ever travel at this speed ever before, and it looks like it's in its own control. It's like it's in control of itself. Well, I told you fearful sights you will see that will bring you to your knee. I told you the Lord said to us in this prayer time that it would go over Italy, this mothership-looking thing. I saw an alien fake invasion coming over Italy and over the Mayan temples down in Mexico, and it would be seen and it would be really scary to a lot of people. And then I saw heavy-set people. I saw people out, like, saying, 'Welcome to Earth.' And they had their signs, and they were like tinfoil hat people, but they were all excited and celebrating this alien deity that they think is going to be like ET. They call it ET. 'Welcome to Earth, ET,' you know? And they were, you know, celebrating, worshiping this thing, excited. Then I saw other, like, ships, little ships flying really fast all over the East Coast, all over the place, shooting around that looked like the size of a car in the vision. And the Lord told me, He said, 'This is coming. A great deception is coming.' And I'm telling you, to the point where I believe that it will even get out eventually and have an interview on TV. Some kind of demonic spirit, something that is going to deceive millions of people to get you to believe that there's some kind of alien life form. It is demonic. And this is where you say, 'Well, where is scripture to back that?' If the Bible says that we can entertain angels unaware—remember that the Bible says we can entertain angels unaware—demons and fallen angels, fallen angels are angels, right? But they're demonic. So if you can entertain angelic beings and be unaware of it, you can entertain demonic spirits and be unaware of it. They're both the same, just two different ones. One's good, one's bad. One's fallen, one's not fallen. So I want you to be on the lookout, just telling y'all, for a fallen angel deception. So if you can entertain angels unaware, you can entertain demonic spirits unaware. Just remember this. So that's what's coming. That was one of the words. And the Lord warned, and I've been saying this clear back in 2023. There's this coming, and now we're seeing stuff talking, and Harvard's talking about it, NASA's talking about it. We don't know what this is that's coming this way. And now all they're talking about is UFO files all this time. Congress said, 'We need to—we see things traveling in the water at hundreds of miles an hour, and it's flying through the water, and it's huge and looks like a football field going through the water,' the Navy, the US Navy, and all this stuff. And I'm like, "Folks, I told you there's demonic stuff that's about to really try to shake the world." And so, I believe we're on the verge of it. I believe we're getting really close to it. How does the devil know? The devil knows because of Adam's lease. The devil knows how close we are to the rapture and to these things. It's getting closer. No man knows the day or the hour. Nobody knows the exact time, but we know the seasons. So, even if we don't know it, the devil knows his timeframe is coming up to do his seven-year tribulation. So, he goes, "I'm watching the fig tree just like we are. I'm watching these things. I may not know the day or the hour that the Son of Man returns, and the rapture of the church, and all the things, because no one knows other than the Father. But the devil knows the signs just like we do. We're watching the fig tree; we're watching these things. We see the signs of the heavens. We see all this stuff." And he's going, "I've got to stop anything I can to keep as many people going to hell as I can right with me," because he knows he's already going to hell. He'll try to delay it or whatever he's going to try to do. But what's the most precious thing to the Father? is a human soul. He died for it. Now, judgment begins in the house of the Lord. I first warned you about judgment beginning in the house of the Lord. And the Lord warned us, and He said, "Brandon, I'm going to shake the pulpits of some ministers in the days ahead." And this is not just non-denominational or charismatic; this is across the board. All religions: Catholic, Methodist, all of us. Okay? He said, "You're going to see a shaking to awaken in my church. Judgment begins in the house of the Lord first." He said, "You're about to see, if you remember, you prepared to play the little clip right here, for judgment begins in the house of the Lord first. A cleansing in the church is yet still to come on a greater scale. A cleansing. There's been patience behind things as He's waiting for people to get it right. There's been patience there for a while now. Seedtime and harvest are accelerating, and things that were behind closed doors will be opened. You're going to see it open. I see an open door. And it's going to be like when you purge it. It's cleaning things, big ministries. For this is part of what comes before the great revival. You see, a great revival is coming. But He's cleaning up His bride, cleaning up the church. You're going to see more of this. He has given time for repentance. He's merciful. I hear Him say, 'I have been merciful, but time is up.' Time is up concerning this. He said, 'You'll see exposing now, not to embarrass, but for healing. There must be healing.' It's like a wound; He's cleaning out the wound. There are big wounds. And yes, they'll be set on the bench, but He is raising up new voices with a backbone that will say what He tells them to say. They're nobodies. They're going to be raising up soon. You're going to see new people, new voices rising up. Woe to you who have hidden sin. He said, 'You repent now.' Woe to you who have hidden sin. He said, 'Time is running out. Time is out. Time is out.' He said, 'Time is not running out. Time is out.' There is a line. He said, 'For judgment begins in the house of the Lord.' First, there's corruption in finances. There will be exposures. There's corruption with money. It's around the globe. He said it's around the globe; it's not just about America. This is about the church. And the church doesn't represent America; the church is the church global. But most people think whenever you're talking about this stuff, it's about America. But He said it's deep within the heart of the body. So we see yesterday a major minister, sounds like a $50 million scandal with trafficking people, trafficking, having relations with women, and making them... it's bad stuff. And this is the beginning, I told you, of great judgment coming on the church, of a cleaning of the house. The Lord warned us that this was coming, and He said it would be like Ananias and Sapphira starting to come. As we go into this timeframe, He said, going into the fall, going into '26, you're going to see a great shaking in the church to awaken. For a harvest of souls, you have to clean up the church first and get it ready for the fish to come in. He said you're going to see a lot of elders go home, and you're going to start to see the new Davids, the new Esthers, and the new Hannahs all come up. You're going to see this new generation. The older generation, you can see it. And it's not like I'm going to say it's like Saul. I'm not, because Saul was in rebellion to what the Lord told him to do. But you see, when the anointing starts to depart from the elders, it's not as strong, and it's going to go to the younger generation. The Lord told me, He said, 'It's going to be like David. You're going to start to see the kingly anointing on people, and they're going to rise up out of seemingly nowhere and people will go, 'Who are these people? What happened?'' And that's what the Lord told me is going to start happening a lot. But He also said that you're going to see some people start to go home, and you're going to start to see judgment begin in the house of the Lord for trafficking. And He even said, 'You'll see the trafficking on the news in the days ahead.' As we prayed, the FBI raids this place. Bam! And I'm like, 'Wow, this is amazing. I praise God.' I don't know how many people are victims of this; it's a very tragic situation. A $50 million scandal of all this going on down there, and how many people are involved, I don't know. They don't talk about it. But it's pretty sickening whenever you start seeing this. And there's more than that. There are a lot of people. I believe there was another one, but without speaking about it, there was another pastor that did something bad, and he was taking pictures of himself sending nude selfies to his volunteers. And I'm like, 'Are you serious? This is bad.' So we see these things starting to happen. A cleansing of the church in certain areas where there's corruption is going to be uncovered. So, if you're a pastor and you're doing bad things, and you're committing... you're messing around on your wife, you're doing things bad with corruption, the Lord told me, He said, 'You're going to see people that are huge ministers with scandals in their finances, a money scandal. You're going to see big money scandals with money laundering, money fraud.' He said there will be embezzlement cases coming up with big ministers with huge platforms, with embezzlement charges, money laundering, and scandals. And it's going to say it in the news: 'Scandal.' Remember what I'm telling you, because it's coming. I want you to remember this. It's coming. Money laundering, money scandals, embezzlement, trafficking, and it's happening just like the Lord said. I had a video sent to me, and they said, 'Do you see what this guy in the UK is talking about?' So, the UK is preparing for a major event of mass casualties, how to incinerate bodies by the lot. So, if there's a mass casualty event, they're trying to pass it in a law that they can incinerate like 700 bodies at a time. I believe it was an astronomical number. It was a lot, like putting them in this burner. It was a burner, from what I understand. And I can show you the little clip right here. You can watch it. But this guy in the UK, he's a doctor and he said this stuff is being talked about in the parliament over there, of what would happen to prepare for a major event in the days ahead. It says here: 'In the event of a major incident resulting in a large number of fatalities which could overwhelm existing body storage, the Home Office would provide contingency support to the requesting local authority.' And these tenders have now been fulfilled. They're talking about core requirements of storage of up to 700 fatalities. So, this is in my spirit what I feel like I've seen about the scorpion with King Charles stinging and all the stuff the Lord's warning us about of an acceleration of war. Is this them preparing for an acceleration of war, or do they know another virus is coming? They know about this virus that the Lord has spoken to me about. How many times, because we went over that again today? We were talking about it. When the Lord spoke to me, I saw 350 million people go home. At least 350 was a big number, and I remember seeing that number. It was projected at 350 million. Well, people say, 'Well, that's not very many, Brandon.' Well, that's the population of the United States of America. That is a lot of people. Regardless of whether you think, 'Well, there are 7 billion, 8 billion people, so 350 million is not that much,' the population in America going home all at once because of a virus is a catastrophic event in my opinion. I don't know how many people live in Australia, but I guarantee you it's not 100 million, maybe. I don't know. That is a lot of people, the population of America. There are a lot of people in America. But to say everybody in America, if you drove from coast to coast and you didn't see one single person on the face of the Earth in America, in the States, everybody's gone—that would be weird, of course. So that's the kind of virus this would be, from what the Lord showed me. I saw it was a massive... He told me even the number 350 million. And then, you know, it's like whenever He told me about British Columbia and the earthquake up there, and He told me, 'Prepare, this earthquake's coming; 30,000 people will go home.' I saw it in that area, 30,000 people. Well, that's a lot of people. That's the population of major towns, you know, of all people gone. We're talking deceased. So when we see the governments are preparing for major events like that, what do they know is coming? It's like Mark Zuckerberg digging holes in the middle of Hawaii, making a huge bunker for like $100 million—you know, a multi-million dollar, $100 million project in the middle of the ground—saying, 'Well, I don't know anything's coming.' Why would you spend that kind of money then? Unless you just want to burn $100 million plus. But there are a lot of these rich people that know, and I told you the Lord warned us in these videos when we're praying: they know something is coming. Inside Mark Zuckerberg's top-secret Hawaii compound, it described a large, self-sufficient underground bunker with what appeared to be a blast-resistant door. 'You do have a bunker there. Is there something you know that we don't?' 'No, I think that's just like a little shelter under... It's like a basement. A little shelter.' 'What are you worried about?' And they're preparing for it. And I saw underground towns in America that were like bunker arcs for survival. And I saw them getting this stuff prepared for a major event that's about to take place. Signs of the times. And that's why I was telling you all about the poles shifting. And I've warned you how many times on this channel that I saw the earth is going to rock and reel like a drunkard. The Bible says... Well, I don't know what's going to cause that, but it's some kind of outside affairs that's going to be causing this. September—I've warned you about September, the month to remember—a major event. The Lord said, 'Watch for this, for it will be the time of separation of the sheep and the goats. And who stands with Israel, I will bless. And who that curses Israel, they'll be cursed.' And I saw major earthquakes happening in these areas, major earthquakes on the ones who do not stand. And this is going to be a dividing line of blessing and cursing. I told you, watch the month of September. And I saw a haze over a month, and then it was a line across it separating September and October. And I thought, 'What is this?' and the Lord said, 'Watch these two months; this is important.' So we're praying into it. So then we get the article right here. You'll see this: Trump decides to speak at the UN again. This is amazing. On the 23rd of September, the beginning of Rosh Hashanah. Okay, the 23rd—that's not a coincidence either. And he's going to stand. So, what is his speech going to be about? Right now, Emmanuel Macron just announced today that he's going to the United Nations next month, and he is going to recognize a Palestinian state. And what I'm hearing is that maybe as many as 185 nations are going to go along with him, and maybe 15 will not, including the United States. And thank God, now I'm hoping Canada doesn't go along with it. I'm hoping the United Kingdom doesn't, and I'm hoping Australia doesn't. But France is definitely leading the charge to try to part the land. You'll see Emmanuel Macron rise up more in the days ahead. That's what has been heard. You'll see Emmanuel Macron rise up in the days ahead. I told you he'll be an Ishmael. He'll be an Ishmael to the Isaac of what's about to... Most people say, 'Oh, he's the Antichrist.' He is not. Watch: he'll be an Ishmael even in the months ahead. He'll take stands against Israel, he'll take stands against things, and he'll look like an Ishmael. Everybody's going to go and sound the alarm: 'It's him! It's him! It's him!' But you'll have an Ishmael on your hands. It's not true. It's a spirit behind him that's paving and tilling the ground. He's tilling the ground, getting it ready for the Antichrist to come. He's tilling the ground. The Lord says, 'He's not ready. This is not him.' But he's tilling the ground. He's the forerunner, tilling the ground, getting the soil ready for him. Everybody said they want to divide and cause Palestine to be a state on the 23rd. They want to talk about this. But we have the eclipse on the 7th, which is next week or so—a week, two weeks, a week and a half away. So, we have this major eclipse going to come. And then they say, 'Well, Trump's like, we're not going to push. We're not going to poke the bear,' which is basically saying we're going to let this thing roll down to the first of the year with Putin and Zelensky because he knows he's stepping into a trap. I told you there were landmines everywhere, and I'm telling you: do not poke the bear. I saw a great escalation with a demonic spirit, the great Apollyon. I saw Apollyon come up out of the pit and start spinning and causing great war on the land. And I saw him interfering with Putin. And I saw... That's what I'm talking about, these incinerators and all this. The Lord's warning us that a major war has the potential to break out. Maybe it won't be about the incinerator and the war; maybe it'll be about the plague. But they're talking about it. That's what I'm trying to tell you all: people are planning. They know something's coming. They want to not be caught off guard. They don't say, 'How are we going to bury all these bodies?' Well, they're planning on a lot of death. That's what you all need to know. They're planning on a lot of people dying. They're not saying, 'Well, how are we going to thrive and have a great time?' No, how do we burn everybody if they're dead? That's not a feel-good sermon, but I'm trying to tell you that the world knows something's about to happen. You can sense it. State media in Pyongyang is saying North Korea's leader Kim Jong-un will be attending China's victory celebration next week that marks the formal surrender of Japan during World War II. Russia's president Vladimir Putin is also to be among those 26 heads of state who will attend this event. I saw them in secret meetings again. I saw them in meetings and they were talking and they were whispering whispers of how to overcome the Western culture. That means it was secret. They didn't want it to be let out. He's being promised a lot. He's being promised a lot. North Korea, Kim Jong-un, they're being promised a lot. It makes them confident. There are secret meetings. I'm telling you, there are secret meetings. There are secret meetings. It's like what I see about North Korea and China and Russia becoming one. And I see an alliance of these countries almost like they're thinking as one, like a covenant. I saw Vladimir Putin with North Korea in the background with Xi Jinping with his allies, okay? And Vladimir Putin had a hand of cards and he had five cards. He had five cards in his hand and he was holding them out like a fan and he was hiding behind those cards. And I saw before that World War III in black letters across. I told you all I saw North Korea siding with China as an Asian front, an Asian front in the days ahead, using Korea as a linchpin. Eventually, I believe Kim Jong-un will be removed, and his sister. The things the Lord showed me about secret meetings... God protect me. I saw little Kim, Russia, and certain major powers. I'll say it like that. I saw certain major powers. I see Kim Jong-un, North Korea. North Korea is in the waiting, is in the waiting, is in the waiting. And then a great escalation to really kick this thing off at a higher level. Escalation. Alliances have been made. Great alliances have been made. Waiting, waiting, waiting. It's not a bluff. This is not a bluff. I hear, "This is not a bluff." This is not a bluff. You must listen. You must listen. This is not a bluff. North Korea doesn't want to be underneath this anymore. They want to come out and have free trade. They want to be able to be a part of the world trade. And there are things being said, with Russia promising them a better tomorrow for the price of war for this. "Help us, help us. They're sending troops. They're sending troops. They're sending aid. They're sending bombs and missile things to help you. Help us, we will help you." It's with the BRICS. And that's what I was telling Dee. I said, "You know, it's what I feel in the spirit, even when we were driving around today doing things." I said, "It feels like Christmas morning, you know, as a kid, that you're about to have this great gift. You're about to get these presents, and you know, but you don't know what's in the boxes, but you see they're wrapped up underneath the tree for you and you're going, 'Man, I just have expectation that something good is about to happen.'" That's what I'm telling you. I feel in my spirit an anticipation that something good is about to happen. I told her, I said, "Do you feel that?" She goes, "Yes." If you have that butterfly, you're excited. You're kind of, "Wow," you know? You have that in your stomach. You're just like, "Wow, something major is about to happen." Well, that's what I feel in the spirit realm. We're on the verge of something major. But as we see Trump say he's going to speak on the 23rd, that's not coincidence. That's not coincidence. I told you. Look at this. This is—that's amazing. I thought he could have picked any day of the month, but he chose the 23rd, folks. I mean, seriously. I mean, do you all think that's coincidence? It's all biblical. It's signs of the times and of the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. It's all happening. And people are like, "Brandon, don't you know the rapture is coming in September?" I personally do not believe it's coming in September. I personally do not. I believe we have a harvest of souls. And billions don't know Jesus. This is where I want to get to next. Tell them how many people have not heard the gospel. They call it the 10/40 window. The 10/40 window. And that is just this rectangular area with the most unreached people in the world, like, that have not heard the gospel of Jesus Christ. This is staggering statistics. Yeah. I want you to understand why the Lord said to me, "If I come back right now, all these people are going to hell." And I didn't know this. And when she started studying this out, she—I said, because we were talking about, "Where should we put a new channel? Where should we plant our—" If you comment down below, if you're watching from another nation and you're watching us right now and we don't speak your language and you have to translate through something or whatever, tell us where you would want another channel. We're trying. I told the Lord, I said, "Show me who's the greatest harvest." And so we were studying who's the most unsaved. And this is where this came out of, brainstorming as a family, praying in the spirit, asking the Father who needs to hear the gospel the most right now, because we can afford right now to expand to one more channel. And we're trying to figure it out. That's where we're at right now. So listen to the statistics of how many people. So there you go. I wanted to tell them why we were doing this. Yeah. So the number one would be India: 1.36 billion people in India unreached. China: 1.3 billion unreached. Pakistan: 243 million unreached. Bangladesh: 174 million unreached. Japan: 120 million. Indonesia: 247 million. Nepal: 30 million. Turkey: 85 million. Iran: 88 million. And Thailand: 70 million. That's a lot. Do you understand why the Lord is—I'm telling you, that is a lot of people going to hell. That's not just—that's not, "Well, that's just one person." No, that's millions upon millions of people that, if Jesus Christ comes back on September the 23rd, are going to hell. And that's why he told me, he said, "I'm coming back for a glorious church.
